title: Oregon National Guard State Tuition Assistance (ONGSTA)
summary: 100% tuition funding at resident rates plus fees and book allowance at eligible Oregon postsecondary institutions. Up to $274 per credit hour for 2025-26.

requirements.notes: Must be current OR National Guard member enrolled at eligible OR institution. Maximum 90 credits (community colleges) or 180 quarter credits/120 semester credits (universities). Must create Federal TA account and education goal. Must file FAFSA.

eligibilityNotes: OR National Guard state program providing 100% tuition at resident rates, certain fees, and book allowance for undergraduate studies. For public universities/community colleges: covers full resident tuition. For private institutions: covers average base resident tuition rate of all OR public universities (not to exceed $274/credit in 2025-26), minus any DoD Federal TA grants. Can be used concurrently with VA education benefits (not counted in award calculation). Post-9/11 GI Bill is affected by ONGSTA funds - contact school's VA Certifying Official. Funds disbursed directly to college/university. Apply through OSAC Student Portal at oregonstudentaid.gov. Administered through Oregon Student Aid Commission (OSAC).
